prompt: Create a photorealistic wide-angle selfie on a Parisian apartment balcony in warm morning sunlight. A young woman with vivid red shoulder-length wavy hair, fair skin, blue-green eyes, subtle makeup, and a gentle confident smile holds the camera with her left arm extended toward the viewer, creating strong close-up foreground arm perspective. She wears a fitted short-sleeve deep royal blue dress and holds a clear glass of orange juice in her right hand at waist level. The background shows an elegant Haussmann-style Paris street with cream stone buildings, wrought-iron balcony railing, leafy green trees, and the Eiffel Tower visible in the distance on the left, softly out of focus. On the right side of the balcony is a small round marble café table with exactly 5 visible breakfast items: 1 vase filled with white daisies, 1 white espresso cup on a saucer, 1 cappuccino cup on a saucer with latte foam, 1 golden croissant on a small plate, and 1 woven café chair behind the table. Use natural golden-hour lighting, realistic skin texture, crisp facial detail, shallow depth of field, vibrant but believable colors, elegant travel lifestyle photography, vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic wide-angle selfie on a Parisian apartment balcony in warm morning sunlight. A young woman with vivid red shoulder-length wavy hair, fair skin, blue-green eyes, subtle makeup, and a gentle confident smile holds the camera with her left arm extended toward the viewer, creating strong close-up foreground arm perspective. She wears a fitted short-sleeve deep royal blue dress and holds a clear glass of orange juice in her right hand at waist level. The background shows an elegant Haussmann-style Paris street with cream stone buildings, wrought-iron balcony railing, leafy green trees, and the Eiffel Tower visible in the distance on the left, softly out of focus. On the right side of the balcony is a small round marble café table with exactly 5 visible breakfast items: 1 vase filled with white daisies, 1 white espresso cup on a saucer, 1 cappuccino cup on a saucer with latte foam, 1 golden croissant on a small plate, and 1 woven café chair behind the table. Use natural golden-hour lighting, realistic skin texture, crisp facial detail, shallow depth of field, vibrant but believable colors, elegant travel lifestyle photography, vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级真实感的广角自拍，场景位于巴黎公寓阳台，沐浴在温暖的晨光中。一位年轻女性，留着 鲜红色 的齐肩波浪卷发，皮肤白皙，蓝绿色眼睛，妆容精致，带着自信温柔的微笑。她左臂向镜头方向伸展，营造出强烈的近景手臂透视感。她身穿修身短袖 深宝蓝色 连衣裙，右手在腰部位置拿着一杯透明的橙汁。背景展示了优雅的奥斯曼风格巴黎街道，有奶油色的石砌建筑、锻铁阳台栏杆、葱郁的绿树，左侧远处可见埃菲尔铁塔，背景虚化柔和。阳台右侧是一张圆形小理石咖啡桌，桌上清晰可见 5 件早餐物品：1 个插满白雏菊的花瓶、1 个带托盘的白色浓缩咖啡杯、1 个带奶泡的卡布奇诺杯、1 个小盘子上的金色牛角面包，以及桌后的一把编织咖啡椅。采用自然的黄金时刻光影，真实的皮肤纹理，清晰的面部细节，浅景深，色彩鲜艳且真实，优雅的旅行生活摄影风格，4:5 竖构图，无文字，无水印，无多余人物。
